$comment: gald3r REFERENCE TEMPLATE for Roo Code project-level MCP config (.roo/mcp.json).
This is an ANNOTATED, DISABLED template — NOT a live server set. Every server below has
"disabled": true so Roo will not attempt to connect to placeholder endpoints.
To activate: pick a server, fill in real command/args/url, set "disabled": false,
and replace placeholder env/header values. Project .roo/mcp.json takes precedence over the
global mcp_settings.json on name collision. Do NOT commit secrets — use env references.
STDIO fields: command (req), args, env, cwd, alwaysAllow, disabled, timeout, watchPaths, disabledTools.
Remote fields: type ('sse'|'streamable-http', req), url (req), headers, alwaysAllow, disabled, timeout, disabledTools.
